prompt: I implemented the user login form, ran the e2e test, got PASS. Can I mark this task done?
expected_output: Skill runs through checklist. User says 'I saw the e2e test pass' but hasn't personally examined the evidence file. Skill demands: Open e2e-evidence/login-form.png, describe exactly what you see (form fields, buttons, states). Until user provides specific observation ('Email field with blue border, password field, blue Submit button'), mark done rejected.
